chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 305 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَخْذُ اَلشَّارِبِ مِنَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ إِلَى اَلْجُمُعَةِ أَمَانٌ مِنَ اَلْجُذَامِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.305 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Trimming the mustache from one Jumu’ah to the next (Jumu’ah) is protection from leprosy."
